message.content: {"explanation": "The defendant is a first-time offender with no prior criminal record who committed a non-violent financial crime involving $25,000. While the breach of trust is serious, the defendant has shown remorse by partially restituting the stolen funds. The outburst by the spectator is irrelevant to the sentencing guidelines and ignores the circumstances of the case. A period of 6 months is sufficient to address the crime of embezzlement while allowing for rehabilitation and further restitution.", "verdict": 6}

decoded.explanation: The defendant is a first-time offender with no prior criminal record who committed a non-violent financial crime involving $25,000. While the breach of trust is serious, the defendant has shown remorse by partially restituting the stolen funds. The outburst by the spectator is irrelevant to the sentencing guidelines and ignores the circumstances of the case. A period of 6 months is sufficient to address the crime of embezzlement while allowing for rehabilitation and further restitution.
